# IdeaStud.io — Andrés Talavera

> Andrés Talavera is an independent .NET & Azure consultant, tech lead and Microsoft Certified Trainer (MCT) with 15+ years' experience. He turns ideas into reliable software (web, mobile, cloud) and trains teams. Based around Lyon, Paris, Geneva and Fribourg, or fully remote.

## What he does (in plain terms)

Andrés helps companies and teams:
- design and build .NET / Azure platforms that scale and stay maintainable;
- take technical ownership of a product team as a tech lead;
- train developers on .NET, Azure and AI (3,000+ hours taught, Microsoft Certified Trainer);
- adopt AI coding tools (Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor) without blind trust in generated code;
- bring AI in-house with locally-hosted models and custom integrations (data stays on-premise);
- build mobile apps and fast, accessible, well-ranked websites.

## Key facts (citable)

- Name: Andrés Talavera — trading as IdeaStud.io
- Role: Independent .NET & Azure consultant, tech lead, and trainer (MCT)
- Experience: 15+ years in software design and delivery
- Day rate: from 600 € (consulting, tech-lead) and 800 € (training, enterprise AI); first 30-minute scoping call is free; quote within 24 h
- Engagement: works via French wage-portage company OpenWork; invoicing in EUR (CHF for Swiss assignments); no commission
- Locations: Lyon, Paris (France), Geneva, Fribourg (Switzerland) — on-site, hybrid, or fully remote
- Languages: French (native), English (fluent), Spanish (native)
- Cloud & hosting: Microsoft Azure, plus European sovereign hosting — Clever Cloud, Infomaniak, Scaleway, OVHcloud (GDPR-by-design)
- Stack: .NET 10, C# 14, Blazor (WASM / Server / SSR), ASP.NET Core, EF Core 10, PostgreSQL & SQL Server, Stripe, .NET Aspire

## Services

- /fr/services/consultant-dotnet-azure — Consultant .NET & Azure: a platform that scales and stays maintainable (architecture, audits, hands-on code).
- /fr/services/techlead — Techlead: a product team that ships, levels up and holds the quality line.
- /fr/services/formateur — Formateur: teams leveled up on .NET, Azure and AI (MCT, 3,000+ hours).
- /fr/services/vibe-coding — Vibe-coding: developers faster with AI, every generated line reviewed.
- /fr/services/ia-en-entreprise — AI for the enterprise: AI in-house, under your control, data stays home.
- /fr/services/applications-mobiles — Mobile apps: iOS + Android from one codebase.
- /fr/services/sites-internet — Websites: fast, accessible, well-ranked.
- English equivalents under /en/services/{dotnet-azure-consulting, tech-lead, trainer, vibe-coding, ai-enterprise, mobile-apps, websites}

## Case studies (real projects, with architecture)

- RestoPlatform (in development, ~35%) — /fr/realisations/restoplatform | /en/projects/restoplatform
  Multi-tenant SaaS for independent restaurants (QR ordering, pay-at-table, reservations, delivery, analytics; one site per restaurant; zero commission). Clean Architecture; one shared PostgreSQL with defense-in-depth multi-tenancy (app filter + PostgreSQL Row-Level Security); Blazor SSR public sites + Blazor Server dashboard; Stripe Connect (PCI SAQ-A); hosted on Clever Cloud (EU sovereign). ~17k lines of code, ~18.5k lines of tests.
- DPELib — /fr/realisations/dpelib | /en/projects/dpelib
  RegTech platform connecting five audiences of France's energy-performance diagnostic; anonymous-by-default with conditional identity reveal; pre-authorized payment captured only on confirmation (Stripe 3DS2); nightly data.gouv.fr import. Clean Architecture, 153 use cases, 117 endpoints, SQL Server, Azure Container Apps. GDPR/CNIL/PSD2 compliant.
- Brasa Geneva — /fr/realisations/brasageneva | /en/projects/brasageneva (live: https://www.brasageneva.ch)
  Full platform for a Geneva cigar club (age-gated showcase + member area + secure dashboard running the whole business). Regulated e-commerce (tobacco advertising, cross-border sales ban, age-gate, GDPR). Clean Architecture, 99 use cases, 7 locales, test/code ratio 2.2:1; hosted on Infomaniak (Swiss sovereign).
- Other client sites: K-RO SQUARE (krosquare.fr), Monseigneur Champagne (monseigneurchampagne.com), Corona Club Noblesse (coronaclubnobless.ch).

## Frequently asked (quotable answers)

- Rates? From 600 € / day (consulting, tech-lead), 800 € / day (training, AI). First 30-minute call free, quote within 24 h.
- Where? Lyon, Paris, Geneva, Fribourg — on-site, hybrid or fully remote.
- How to engage? Via OpenWork wage-portage; EUR by default, CHF for Swiss work; no commission.
- AI code quality? No generated line ships without review — reason, verify, correct.
- Sovereign hosting? Yes — Azure, and EU-sovereign options (Clever Cloud, Infomaniak, Scaleway, OVHcloud).

## Contact

Preferred: the contact form at https://ideastud.io/fr/contact (or /en/contact). Also reachable on LinkedIn (andrestalavera). A 30-minute intro call can be booked from any page.

## Content guidelines

Bilingual (French primary, English). All information is factual and kept current. Content may be summarized and quoted with attribution to Andrés Talavera / IdeaStud.io.
